recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Drama
recommendations.overview: A young wizard accidentally conjures a spell that puts her family in jeopardy.

recommendations.title: Minutemen
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When three high-school friends invent a time-machine, they decide to use it to go back in time and prevent other youngsters from making humiliating mistakes.

recommendations.title: Beverly Hills Chihuahua 3: Viva la Fiesta!
recommendations.overview: When Papi, Chloe, the pups, Uncle Pedro, and their owners move to a hotel, the smallest pup Rosa feels like she doesn't fit in, and Papi wants to make her feel better by showing her how special she is.

recommendations.title: The Usual Suspects
recommendations.overview: Held in an L.A. interrogation room, Verbal Kint attempts to convince the feds that a mythic crime lord, Keyser Soze, not only exists, but was also responsible for drawing him and his four partners into a multi-million dollar heist that ended with an

recommendations.title: 3 Idiots
recommendations.overview: Rascal. Joker. Dreamer. Genius... You've never met a college student quite like "Rancho." From the moment he arrives at India's most prestigious university, Rancho's outlandish schemes turn the campus upside down—along with the lives of his two newfo

recommendations.title: Palmer
recommendations.overview: After 12 years in prison, former high school football star Eddie Palmer returns home to put his life back together—and forms an unlikely bond with Sam, an outcast boy from a troubled home. But Eddie's past threatens to ruin his new life and family.

recommendations.title: Nebraska
recommendations.overview: An aging, booze-addled father takes a trip from Montana to Nebraska with his estranged son in order to claim what he believes to be a million-dollar sweepstakes prize.

recommendations.title: Fool's Paradise
recommendations.overview: A down-on-his-luck publicist discovers a recently released mental health patient who looks just like a misbehaving movie star. The publicist subs him into a film, creating a new star. But fame and fortune are not all they are cracked up to be.

recommendations.title: Jolly LLB
recommendations.overview: Wanting to earn fame and fortune, a small time lawyer files a PIL for an infamous hit-and-run, and thus learns what it really is like to be a lawyer.

recommendations.title: Swindle
recommendations.overview: A boy named Griffin finds a valuable multi-million dollar baseball card. After accidentally selling the card for a million dollar loss, he enlists the help of his best friend Ben and his colleagues to regain the baseball card.
